title: pyrus × splendida
intro: Pyrus × splendida, also known as the pear willow or Chinese pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a natural hybrid of pear and willow. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The health benefits of Pyrus × splendida include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Pyrus × splendida can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
